title: Fast gapple
description: Fast Gapple is a lightweight Fabric mod that reduces golden apple eating time, making combat faster and more responsive.
body:
Fast Gapple is a lightweight Fabric mod that reduces golden apple eating time, making combat faster and more responsive.

Features:

⚡ Faster golden apple consumption

🍏 Works smoothly with Fabric

🎮 Lightweight and simple

🔧 No unnecessary extra features

Perfect for:

PvP players

Fast combat gameplay

Practice servers

Compatibility:

Fabric Loader

Minecraft 1.21+![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4cc168c0b553755c3f9383a78447fdb807a8d01_0.webp)
